name: Potato Pancakes Vonnas with Smoked Salmon & Osetra Cavi
recipeIngredient: 3 large Idaho Potatoes, peeled and diced
1/4 cup Creme fraiche or sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook three large, peeled and diced potatoes in salted water until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes and pass them through a food mill or sieve with fine holes to create a puree.
3. Add the potato puree to an electric mixer with a paddle attachment. Mix thoroughly with 2 tablespoons of Corn starch.
4. Slowly incorporate the eggs and egg whites, then add the heavy cream. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. In a separate bowl, stir the lemon juice into the Creme fraiche or sour cream.
6. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
7. Spoon the pancake mixture onto the skillet, shaping it into round pancakes (about silver dollar size).
8. Cook for 90 seconds on each side until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Place the pancakes on a plate and serve with one slice of smoked salmon, one tablespoon of the reserved Creme fraiche or sour cream mixture, and a heaping teaspoon of osetra caviar (optional).
10. Garnish with dill sprigs and serve.
